calendar.matters:
Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion Re: Writ Not Be Stayed On Appeal.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Motion For Issuance Of Peremtory Writ Of Mandate And/Or Prohibition
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mitchell Green, Esq. for and with the Petitioner Yelena Kolodji. Judith Loach, Deputy Attorney General for Respondent Board of Registered Nursing et al. Anna Duckworth for CBS Radio also present in court.
In open court, the Court provides counsel with a copy of the tentative ruling for review.
The Court hears defendant's objection for a request of Media Coverage from CBS Radio.
Afte hearing the oral argument by Ms. Loach, Media Request for audio recording is granted in open court, order signed for same.
The Court hears motions by the parties.
After hearing the oral arguments and considering all the moving papers, the Court adopted the tentative ruling and will issue an order forthwith.
Dept. 306 Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, CSR Joanna Broadwell #10959
